---
dataset-title: "Care Board"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../project_dataset_style.css">

<div class="dataset-container">
    <!-- Header Section -->
    <header class="dataset-header">
        <p class="header-tagline">Project Dataset</p>
        <h2 class="header-title"> {{< meta dataset-title >}}</h2>
        <div class="header-buttons">
            <a href="mailto:kansasdata@ku.edu" class="btn btn-download">
                <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill icon"></i> Request Dataset Access
            </a>

            <a href="../projects/project_Care_Board.html" class="btn btn-project">
                <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill icon"></i> View Project Page
            </a>

            <a href="../classplan/class_Care_Board.html" class="btn btn-classplan">
                <i class="bi bi-book-half icon"></i> View the Class Plan
            </a>

        </div>
    </header>
</div>
```

::: content-card
## About the Data

For access to this dataset, please contact KDSC at [kansasdata\@ku.edu](mailto:kansasdata@ku.edu).
:::
